title: Automation Failure Notifications and Reporting
excerpt:

posts.author: antonygarnett (Antony)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have many automations running in various workspaces and on various boards. Does any know a way to report or notify a user of failures that may occur with automations ?

We have recently had a number of automations that failed and for no reason. I’ve recreated the Automations exactly the same and they work! But I wasn’t aware of these failures for a few days when a colleague noticed that there may be an issue - it would be more helpful to know about them when they happen.

Thank you

posts.author: Megan345 (Megan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Antony, I receive notification of automation failures (for the automations I own) by default within my monday.com account, from the bell icon. Are you the owner of the automations that failed?
